decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy focused on dealing damage quickly. By utilizing efficient spells and creatures, such as Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, along with card draw and direct damage spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage, the deck aims to maintain pressure and control the pace of the game. By leveraging the prowess ability of your creatures and taking advantage of card advantage through spells like Consider and Academic Dispute, the deck seeks to secure a swift victory through a relentless assault.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to utilize a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage to control the game and outvalue the opponent. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, this deck aims to maintain board control and eventually close out the game with powerful threats like Stormchaser's Talent and Gran-Gran. The inclusion of various spells like Divide by Zero and Fiery Impulse allows for flexibility in handling different types of threats, while generating card advantage with cards like Consider and Accumulate Wisdom.

The main focus of this aggro Red Deck Wins archetype is to deal damage quickly and efficiently to the opponent. This is achieved through a combination of low-cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Emberheart Challenger, as well as burn spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage. The deck also utilizes lands like Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins to provide additional sources of damage. The key strategy is to apply consistent pressure to the opponent, forcing them to react quickly or risk losing the game.

The deck focuses on quickly playing efficient creatures, disrupting the opponent with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben, and generating value through cards like Collected Company and Skyclave Apparition. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggression and disruption, using cards like Enduring Innocence and Archon of Emeria to slow down the opponent while building a wide board presence. The deck also includes some removal options in the form of Elspeth, Storm Slayer and Anointed Peacekeeper to deal with threats and maintain control of the battlefield.

The deck focuses on using Greasefang Parhelion's abilities in combination with various cards to create a powerful combo that overwhelms the opponent. By utilizing cards like Bitter Triumph, Concealed Courtyard, and Thundering Broodwagon, the deck aims to control the board and generate massive advantage in the mid-to-late game. Thoughtseize and Cache Grab provide valuable card selection and disruption. Overall, the deck aims to assemble its key pieces quickly and efficiently to execute its combo strategy and secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. The deck includes cards that deal direct damage to the opponent, as well as creatures with abilities that make them difficult to block or remove. By playing aggressive creatures early in the game and using burn spells to finish off the opponent, this deck aims to win quickly before the opponent can set up their own game plan. The inclusion of land cards that provide additional benefits adds extra versatility and power to the deck.

This UR Aggro deck aims to quickly overwhelm opponents with low-cost creatures and burn spells. Academic Dispute and Boomerang Basics provide card advantage while Riverpyre Verge and Cori-Steel Cutter deal damage efficiently. Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage are key attackers, boosted by spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage. The deck is designed to put pressure on opponents early and maintain aggression throughout the game, ultimately leading to a swift victory through a combination of creature damage and direct burn spells.

The main concept of this UW Control deck is to maintain control of the game through card draw, counterspells, and board wipes while also utilizing the companion Kaheera, the Orphanguard for additional value. The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan and outvaluing them with powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Elspeth, Storm Slayer. Additionally, the deck includes a variety of utility lands and versatile spells to handle different threats, ensuring that the control player can adapt to various situations and come out on top.

This Orzhov Control deck focuses on utilizing Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion to maximize its effectiveness. The deck includes a variety of removal spells like Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse to control the board, while also running cards like Thoughtseize to disrupt your opponent's strategy. The deck also features cards like Rite of Oblivion to deal with threats and Nurturing Pixie to generate card advantage. By utilizing the companion mechanic and a mix of removal and disruption spells, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast its opponents in the Pioneer format.

The deck focuses on utilizing Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful combo that overwhelms the opponent. By using cards like Fleeting Spirit and Guardian of New Benalia to protect and support the combo pieces, as well as using Monument to Endurance to fuel the strategy, the deck aims to quickly establish a dominant position on the battlefield. With disruption and removal spells like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize, the deck aims to control the game until it can assemble the necessary pieces for a game-winning combo.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays with low-cost creatures and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By deploying threats like Soul-Scar Mage, Monastery Swiftspear, and Emberheart Challenger early on, backed up by Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to remove blockers, the deck aims to deal damage fast and finish the game before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of storm-themed cards like Stormchaser's Talent and Shivan Reef adds extra synergy and versatility to the aggressive strategy. With a mix of creature damage and direct burn, this deck aims to bring the heat and close out games quickly.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a wide array of counterspells, card draw, and removal spells. It aims to establish control on the board through powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Narset, Parter of Veils, while also disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Dovin's Veto and Supreme Verdict. The deck also includes powerful card advantage engines like Consult the Star Charts and Memory Deluge to outvalue the opponent. The mana base is flexible and versatile, allowing for smooth mana curve progression and strong spell casting.

The deck focuses on using Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a powerful card advantage engine in a control shell. The deck utilizes a variety of different lands and spells to help ensure that Niv-Mizzet Reborn is able to consistently draw powerful multicolored cards. In addition, the deck includes a mix of removal spells and threats to control the board and outvalue the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Bring to Light and Leyline Binding further enhance the deck's ability to control the game and outmaneuver the opponent.

This deck focuses on the interaction between Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck includes support cards such as Bitter Triumph, Thoughtseize, and Fatal Push to control the game and protect the combo pieces. The goal is to efficiently ramp up resources while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately leading to a game-winning combo finish. The mana base is carefully constructed to ensure consistency and stability in executing the combo strategy.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells to quickly pressure the opponent and control the board. By using a mix of powerful creatures like Momo, Friendly Flier and Cecil, Dark Knight alongside efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Vanishing Verse, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and maintain dominance throughout the game. Additionally, cards like Thoughtseize and Quantum Riddler provide disruptive elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Plaza of Heroes and Unholy Annex provide additional value and versatility to the deck.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient and aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, while using burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to control the board and remove threats. The deck also utilizes card draw and selection spells like Consider and Stock Up to maintain momentum and find the pieces needed for victory. With a focus on speed and tempo, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents early in the game and maintain pressure throughout.
